name: census-acs-county
_note: urban-planning.census-acs-county is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/urbanplanning.js, PATH-3, hyphenated key) that calls the REAL US Census ACS 5-year API over the network when given valid FIPS. The DETERMINISTIC, NETWORK-FREE surface is the input validation: stateFips pads to 2 digits / countyFips to 3 and a value that fails /^\d{2}$/ + /^\d{3}$/ rejects BEFORE any fetch with 'stateFips (2 digits) + countyFips (3 digits) required'. NOTE empty/absent FIPS pads to '00'/'000' which IS format-valid and would reach the network — so the network-free fuzz cases here only cover the malformed/over-long inputs that reject pre-fetch. Network failures are caught and returned as { ok:false, error:'census unreachable: …' } (never thrown). LENS_ACTIONS-only AND network-bound → not driven by the macro-assassin; the pre-fetch validation is pinned by server/tests/urban-planning-lens-macros.test.js.
